mode=supported
kind=run
url=https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax
docs_urls=https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax
added_at=2026-03-13
notes=matrix fail-fast false keeps later rows running after a sibling failure
